/usr/bin/clang++ -g -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/main1.dir/src/Objet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main1.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o main1  thirdParty/SFML/lib/libsfml-graphics-s-d.a thirdParty/SFML/lib/libsfml-window-s-d.a thirdParty/SFML/lib/libsfml-system-s-d.a -ObjC -framework OpenGL -framework Foundation -framework AppKit -framework IOKit -framework Carbon thirdParty/SFML/lib/libharfbuzzd.a thirdParty/SFML/lib/libfreetyped.a
